---
title: &TITLE Alan Vladimir Godínez Plascencia
last: Godínez
first: Alan
people_group: gradstudent
email: "vladimiralan@comunidad.unam.mx"
education:
  - Ph.D. Biomedical Sciences program | UNAM
subtitle: Ph.D student
description: ""
bio: "Alan is a late-stage PhD student working at the International Laboratory for Human Genome Research (LIIGH-UNAM), under the supervision of Dr. Federico Sánchez Quinto.
As a member of the Paleogenomics and Evolutionary Biology Laboratory, his research focuses on the evolutionary history of immune-related genes, particularly the HLA system. He is interested in investigating what ancient DNA can reveal about demographic events, long-term selection, and present-day human health. With a strong interest in leveraging reproducible bioinformatics workflows to tackle paleogenomic questions."
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full # La página se muestra en ancho completo.
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:vladimiralan@comunidad.unam.mx
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## Description

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
